name: Cardiff International Athletics Stadium (Leckwith)
metaTitle: Cardiff International Athletics Stadium | Facility Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check the latest wind speed and facility information for the Cardiff International Athletics Stadium in Leckwith.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Evening access is generally available for public sessions. Please check the Cardiff City House of Sport online booking system for today's available slots.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Pricing varies by session. Visit the official website for the latest pay-as-you-go rates and concessions.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: An international standard facility featuring a certified 8-lane 400m track and a full range of field event facilities.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Free on-site parking is available. IMPORTANT: You must enter your vehicle registration at the reception desk to avoid a parking fine.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Cardiff International Sports Campus, Leckwith Road, Cardiff, CF11 8AZ

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Check availability and book sessions via the Cardiff City House of Sport website.
